description: Celebrate diversity and activism this Pride Month with our vibrant newsletter template. Designed in an eye-catching dark mode, it's perfect for promoting your Pride Month events, whether it's a lively parade or a relaxed gathering. Extend an invitation to your subscribers to join in the festivities, offer them a drink or two, and celebrate the spirit of the LGBTQ community. With a splash of rainbow colors, it's sure to capture the essence of Pride. It's not just about food and beverage offers, it's about commemorating global observances and celebrations, and promoting a sense of unity and acceptance. So, why wait? Start spreading the joy of Pride Month with this engaging email template.
short_description: Celebrate Pride Month with our interactive dark mode friendly newsletter template. Perfect for promoting LGBTQ events, parades, or rainbow-themed celebrations. Offers for food and beverage included. Engage your audience with vibrant visuals and compelling content. Raise a glass this Pride Month for love, equality, and unity.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
